asset.title: Two Client Live Sync
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: Excellent side-by-side demonstration of real-time synchronization and agent interaction across two clients. The zoom-ins effectively maintain legibility.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates message passing and spreadsheet cell updates syncing instantly between Client A and Client B.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete flow from initial state, user action, agent execution, to synchronized final state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean side-by-side layout with smooth transitions and helpful zoom-ins on active areas.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom ecosystem, showcasing spreadsheets, chat, and agent execution.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity capture of actual UI behavior with realistic data and real-time updates.

legibility.evidence: Initial split-screen view has small text, but subsequent zoom-ins ensure key details are readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for multi-user financial modeling and collaborative AI workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the latency and step-by-step execution of the server-led agent.

observedEvidence: AI agent cell locking and value updates in spreadsheet

defects.observed: Text in the full split-screen view is quite small and hard to read before the zoom-in occurs.
defects.fix: Consider starting with a slightly tighter crop or larger default UI scaling if possible.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom sync messages and spreadsheet updates instantly across multiple clients as a server-led agent reconciles financial data in real time.
